description: Case diameter: 40 mm Case thickness: 11 mmDial shape: RoundFibre case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortBlack fibre strap with pattern and a tang clasp for comfort and styleSilver coloured dial brand logo at the 12 hour mark and branding at the 6 hour markQuartz movement of time display Screw to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 50 meters allowing you to use it when washing your hands, in light rain etc.
